title: Single-cell fixed RNA profiling of the osteosarcoma clinical Spectrum identifies ADAMTS12 and RNASE1 as key drivers of the metastatic niche.
snippet: Osteosarcoma (OS) suffers from stagnant survival rates due to high metastatic potential and genomic complexity. Here, we present a high-resolution single-cell transcriptomic atlas of the OS ecosystem using single-cell fixed RNA profiling (FLEX) of 40,401 cells across four clinical stages: treatment-naïve, post-chemotherapy, recurrent, and lung metastat...
